days.title: Arrival in Sydney
days.subtitle: First day exploring beaches and local cuisine

timeline.title: Arrive at Sydney Airport
timeline.detail: Your flight from Kuala Lumpur lands at Sydney Airport. Follow the signs to the train station for a convenient ride to the city centre.

timeline.title: Train to Town Hall Station
timeline.detail: Take the Airport Link train to Town Hall Station, which takes about 30 minutes. Enjoy the views of the city as you travel.

timeline.title: Check in to The Grace Hotel
timeline.detail: Check in to The Grace Hotel, a heritage-listed 4-star hotel located just a short walk from Town Hall. Freshen up and prepare for the day ahead.

timeline.title: Lunch at Bondi Trattoria
timeline.detail: Enjoy a delicious meal at Bondi Trattoria, known for its fresh Italian seafood and stunning beach views. Try their seafood spaghetti.
timeline.mapQuery: Bondi Trattoria, Bondi Beach, Sydney, Australia

timeline.title: Bondi Beach Visit
timeline.detail: Spend the afternoon lounging at Bondi Beach. Swim, sunbathe, or take a stroll along the iconic Bondi to Coogee coastal walk for breathtaking views.

timeline.title: Dinner at Icebergs Dining Room and Bar
timeline.detail: Dine at the famous Icebergs with a stunning view of Bondi Beach. Their modern Australian menu features fresh ingredients and excellent wine selection.
timeline.mapQuery: Icebergs Dining Room and Bar, Bondi Beach, Sydney, Australia

localTips: Consider getting an Opal card for easy travel on public transport around Sydney.
Arrive early at Bondi to secure a good spot on the beach, especially on weekends.
Try to catch a local event at Bondi Pavilion for cultural performances.

days.title: Exploring Sydney's Sights
days.subtitle: Culture and iconic landmarks

timeline.title: Breakfast at The Grounds of Alexandria
timeline.detail: Start your day at The Grounds of Alexandria, a unique cafe known for its vibrant atmosphere and delicious, locally sourced breakfast options.
timeline.mapQuery: The Grounds of Alexandria, Sydney, Australia

timeline.title: Visit Sydney Opera House
timeline.detail: Take a guided tour of the iconic Sydney Opera House and learn about its architecture and history. Be sure to book your tour in advance.

timeline.title: Lunch at Circular Quay
timeline.detail: Enjoy lunch at one of the many eateries at Circular Quay with a view of the harbor. Try the fish and chips or fresh seafood.

timeline.title: Exploration of The Rocks
timeline.detail: Explore the historic district of The Rocks. Visit its galleries, markets, and shops while learning about Sydney's colonial history.

timeline.title: Visit Sydney Tower Eye
timeline.detail: Take in the spectacular views of Sydney from the Sydney Tower Eye's observation deck. Be sure to book your ticket ahead of time to skip the lines.

timeline.title: Dinner at Spice Temple
timeline.detail: Experience modern Chinese cuisine at Spice Temple, known for its unique flavors and stylish décor. Try the mapo tofu and Peking duck.

localTips: If interested in cultural shows, check the Opera House schedule for upcoming performances.
The Rocks area often has free walking tours; consider joining one for great insights.
Pre-book your meals at popular restaurants to avoid long waiting times.

days.title: More of Sydney
days.subtitle: Enjoying local food and beach life

timeline.title: Breakfast at Gelato Messina
timeline.detail: Start your day with a treat from Gelato Messina, famous for its artisan gelato. Try their unique flavors like salted caramel and white chocolate.

timeline.title: Ferry to Manly Beach
timeline.detail: Take a scenic ferry ride from Circular Quay to Manly Beach, enjoying stunning views of the Sydney Harbour along the way.

timeline.title: Manly Beach Relaxation
timeline.detail: Spend your day at Manly Beach. Relax, swim, or join a surf lesson if you're feeling adventurous. The beach vibe here is relaxed and inviting.

timeline.title: Lunch at The Boathouse
timeline.detail: Enjoy lunch at The Boathouse, a popular beachfront eatery known for its fresh produce and casual dining atmosphere. Don't miss their fish tacos.
timeline.mapQuery: The Boathouse, Manly Beach, Sydney, Australia

timeline.title: Explore Manly Corso
timeline.detail: Walk along Manly Corso, which is lined with shops and cafes. Perfect for last-minute souvenir shopping or just enjoying the ocean breeze.

timeline.title: Ferry back to Sydney
timeline.detail: Take the ferry back to Sydney, enjoying the views one last time before the end of your trip.
timeline.mapQuery: Manly Beach Ferry Wharf, Manly, Australia

localTips: Make sure to carry sunscreen and stay hydrated at the beach.
Check ferry schedules, especially during weekends for any changes.
Local markets may have great snack options to try; explore if you have extra time.

hotels.name: The Grace Hotel
hotels.note: Heritage-listed hotel, close to Town Hall

budget.note: Average cost for dining out per day
Cost of round trip ferry tickets

urgent.label: Book Sydney Opera House tour
urgent.note: Tour tickets sell out quickly; book ahead at sydneyoperahouse.com.

urgent.label: Reserve dining at Icebergs
urgent.note: Popular spot; reservations are highly recommended.
